FAQ.title: Frequently Asked Questions
FAQ.subtitle: Everything you need to know about Idento

offline.question: Does it really work without internet?
offline.answer: Yes! Idento is built with an offline-first architecture. All core features work without internet connection. Data is stored locally on your device and automatically syncs when you're back online.

printers.question: What printers are supported?
printers.answer: Idento supports a wide range of printers including thermal badge printers, label printers, and standard office printers. You can connect via USB, Bluetooth, or network. We support popular brands like Zebra, Dymo, Brother, and more.

import.question: Can I import my existing attendee list?
import.answer: Absolutely! Import CSV files with any column structure. Our system automatically detects fields like name, email, company, etc. You can also manually map columns if needed. We support files with thousands of rows.

security.question: Is my data secure?
security.answer: Security is our top priority. All data is encrypted at rest and in transit. For self-hosted deployments, your data never leaves your infrastructure. We're GDPR compliant and follow industry best practices for data protection.

mobile.question: Do you have a mobile app?
mobile.answer: Yes! We have a native Android app with full offline support. iOS app is coming soon. The mobile app is perfect for on-site check-in staff and includes built-in QR code scanning.

formats.question: What badge formats are supported?
formats.answer: Idento supports all standard badge sizes from business card (3.5x2) to large format (4x6 and beyond). You can create custom sizes, add QR codes, logos, photos, and dynamic text fields from your attendee data.

customize.question: Can I customize the badge design?
customize.answer: Yes! Our visual badge editor lets you drag and drop elements, choose fonts and colors, add your logo, and map any field from your attendee data. Save templates to reuse across events.

migrate.question: How do I migrate from another system?
migrate.answer: We provide migration guides and support for popular event management platforms. Export your data as CSV from your current system and import into Idento. Our team can help with custom migration needs for Enterprise plans.
